<!--
Release drafting notes:
- Lead with changes icon users feel in the app: search, icon set coverage, copy/export behavior, performance, UI behavior, and deployment availability.
- Include docs, demo, build tooling, dependency, or release-process changes only when they affect app users.
- Fixes should include the short commit id.
- Keep the summary short and concrete.
-->

# Icon Explorer v3.x.x

Release date: YYYY-MM-DD

## Summary

Short user-facing summary of what changed for Icon Explorer users.

## What's Changed

**Features:**

- `commitid` Describe new search, icon set, copy/export, performance, deployment, or UI behavior.

**Fixes:**

- `commitid` Describe the bug, who it affected, and what now works correctly.

**Maintenance:**

- `commitid` Include only user-relevant maintenance, such as package prep, compatibility updates, or dependency updates that users may notice.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Compatibility

- Node.js: `>=22.13`
- pnpm: `>=11.5.0`
- Quasar: `^2.20.1`
- Quasar App Vite target: `@quasar/app-vite@3.0.0-rc.3`
- Vue: `^3.5.38`
- Browsers:

## Installation

Use the deployed app, or build from source if you are self-hosting.

## Documentation

- App: https://iconexplorer.app/
- Repository: https://github.com/hawkeye64/iconexplorer.app
